de.title: Rechnung (Peppol BIS 3.0 / UBL)
de.description: E-Rechnung für Partner in den Niederlanden und der EU: PDF/A-3a mit eingebettetem Peppol-BIS-3.0-UBL-XML und PDF/UA-1-Tagging.

en.title: Invoice (Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 / UBL)
en.description: E-invoice for partners in the Netherlands and EU. PDF/A-3a with embedded Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 UBL XML + PDF/UA-1 tagging.

constraints: html lang attribute MUST be set on <html>
every MUST have a non-empty alt attribute
company.vatId MUST be a valid EU VAT-ID
Peppol BIS 3.0 attachment is generated from the same data object as the HTML body

attachments.content_template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<Invoice
  xmlns="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:Invoice-2"
  xmlns:cac="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonAggregateComponents-2"
  xmlns:cbc="urn:oasis:names:specification:ubl:schema:xsd:CommonBasicComponents-2">

  <!-- Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 conformance -->
  <cbc:CustomizationID>urn:cen.eu:en16931:2017#compliant#urn:fdc:peppol.eu:2017:poacc:billing:3.0</cbc:CustomizationID>
  <cbc:ProfileID>urn:fdc:peppol.eu:2017:poacc:billing:01:1.0</cbc:ProfileID>

  <!-- BT-1 Invoice number -->
  <cbc:ID>{{ data.documentNumber }}</cbc:ID>
  <!-- BT-2 Issue date -->
  <cbc:IssueDate>{{ data.documentDate }}</cbc:IssueDate>
  {% if data.financials.paymentTerms.paymentTargetDays %}
  <!-- BT-9 Due date — derived: issueDate + paymentTargetDays -->
  <cbc:DueDate>{{ data.documentDate }}</cbc:DueDate>
  {% endif %}
  <!-- BT-3 Invoice type code (380 = Commercial invoice) -->
  <cbc:InvoiceTypeCode>380</cbc:InvoiceTypeCode>
  {% if data.bodyOutroduction %}
  <cbc:Note>{{ data.bodyOutroduction }}</cbc:Note>
  {% endif %}
  <!-- BT-5 Invoice currency -->
  <cbc:DocumentCurrencyCode>EUR</cbc:DocumentCurrencyCode>
  {% if data.customerOrderNumber %}
  <cac:OrderReference>
    <cbc:ID>{{ data.customerOrderNumber }}</cbc:ID>
  </cac:OrderReference>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- Seller (Supplier) -->
  <cac:AccountingSupplierParty>
    <cac:Party>
      <cac:PartyName>
        <cbc:Name>{{ data.company.name }}</cbc:Name>
      </cac:PartyName>
      <cac:PostalAddress>
        <cbc:StreetName>{{ data.company.address | default('') }}</cbc:StreetName>
        <cac:Country>
          <cbc:IdentificationCode>DE</cbc:IdentificationCode>
        </cac:Country>
      </cac:PostalAddress>
      <!-- BT-31 Seller VAT identifier -->
      <cac:PartyTaxScheme>
        <cbc:CompanyID>{{ data.company.vatId }}</cbc:CompanyID>
        <cac:TaxScheme>
          <cbc:ID>VAT</cbc:ID>
        </cac:TaxScheme>
      </cac:PartyTaxScheme>
      <cac:PartyLegalEntity>
        <cbc:RegistrationName>{{ data.company.name }}</cbc:RegistrationName>
        {% if data.company.taxId %}
        <cbc:CompanyID>{{ data.company.taxId }}</cbc:CompanyID>
        {% endif %}
      </cac:PartyLegalEntity>
    </cac:Party>
  </cac:AccountingSupplierParty>

  <!-- Buyer (Customer) -->
  <cac:AccountingCustomerParty>
    <cac:Party>
      <cac:PartyName>
        <cbc:Name>{{ data.documentAddress.name }}</cbc:Name>
      </cac:PartyName>
      <cac:PostalAddress>
        <cbc:StreetName>{{ data.documentAddress.street }}</cbc:StreetName>
        <cbc:CityName>{{ data.documentAddress.city }}</cbc:CityName>
        <cbc:PostalZone>{{ data.documentAddress.zipCode }}</cbc:PostalZone>
        <cac:Country>
          <cbc:IdentificationCode>{{ data.documentAddress.country | default('NL') }}</cbc:IdentificationCode>
        </cac:Country>
      </cac:PostalAddress>
      <cac:PartyLegalEntity>
        <cbc:RegistrationName>{{ data.documentAddress.name }}</cbc:RegistrationName>
      </cac:PartyLegalEntity>
    </cac:Party>
  </cac:AccountingCustomerParty>

  <!-- Payment means / IBAN -->
  {% if data.payment.iban %}
  <cac:PaymentMeans>
    <!-- 30 = Credit transfer (UNTDID 4461) -->
    <cbc:PaymentMeansCode>30</cbc:PaymentMeansCode>
    <cbc:PaymentID>{{ data.documentNumber }}</cbc:PaymentID>
    <cac:PayeeFinancialAccount>
      <cbc:ID>{{ data.payment.iban | replace(' ', '') }}</cbc:ID>
      {% if data.payment.bankName %}
      <cbc:Name>{{ data.payment.bankName }}</cbc:Name>
      {% endif %}
      {% if data.payment.bic %}
      <cac:FinancialInstitutionBranch>
        <cbc:ID>{{ data.payment.bic }}</cbc:ID>
      </cac:FinancialInstitutionBranch>
      {% endif %}
    </cac:PayeeFinancialAccount>
  </cac:PaymentMeans>
  {% endif %}

  <!-- Tax breakdown -->
  {% set vat_amount = (data.totals.gross.amount | float) - (data.totals.net.amount | float) %}
  <cac:TaxTotal>
    <cbc:TaxAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ '%.2f' % vat_amount }}</cbc:TaxAmount>
    <cac:TaxSubtotal>
      <cbc:TaxableAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ data.totals.net.amount }}</cbc:TaxableAmount>
      <cbc:TaxAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ '%.2f' % vat_amount }}</cbc:TaxAmount>
      <cac:TaxCategory>
        <!-- S = Standard rate (UNTDID 5305) -->
        <cbc:ID>S</cbc:ID>
        <cbc:Percent>{{ data.financials.tax.taxRates.standard }}</cbc:Percent>
        <cac:TaxScheme>
          <cbc:ID>VAT</cbc:ID>
        </cac:TaxScheme>
      </cac:TaxCategory>
    </cac:TaxSubtotal>
  </cac:TaxTotal>

  <!-- Document totals (BT-106 / 109 / 112 / 115) -->
  <cac:LegalMonetaryTotal>
    <cbc:LineExtensionAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ data.totals.net.amount }}</cbc:LineExtensionAmount>
    <cbc:TaxExclusiveAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ data.totals.net.amount }}</cbc:TaxExclusiveAmount>
    <cbc:TaxInclusiveAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ data.totals.gross.amount }}</cbc:TaxInclusiveAmount>
    <cbc:PayableAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ data.totals.gross.amount }}</cbc:PayableAmount>
  </cac:LegalMonetaryTotal>

  <!-- Invoice lines -->
  {% for li in data.lineItems %}
  <cac:InvoiceLine>
    <cbc:ID>{{ loop.index }}</cbc:ID>
    <cbc:InvoicedQuantity unitCode="C62">{{ li.quantity }}</cbc:InvoicedQuantity>
    <cbc:LineExtensionAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ li.lineItemRevenue.net.amount }}</cbc:LineExtensionAmount>
    <cac:Item>
      <cbc:Name>{{ li.name }}</cbc:Name>
      {% if li.description %}
      <cbc:Description>{{ li.description }}</cbc:Description>
      {% endif %}
      {% if li.number %}
      <cac:SellersItemIdentification>
        <cbc:ID>{{ li.number }}</cbc:ID>
      </cac:SellersItemIdentification>
      {% endif %}
      <cac:ClassifiedTaxCategory>
        <cbc:ID>S</cbc:ID>
        <cbc:Percent>{{ li.effectiveTaxRate }}</cbc:Percent>
        <cac:TaxScheme>
          <cbc:ID>VAT</cbc:ID>
        </cac:TaxScheme>
      </cac:ClassifiedTaxCategory>
    </cac:Item>
    <cac:Price>
      <cbc:PriceAmount currencyID="EUR">{{ li.price.net.amount }}</cbc:PriceAmount>
    </cac:Price>
  </cac:InvoiceLine>
  {% endfor %}
</Invoice>

de.pay_within: Bitte überweisen Sie den Betrag innerhalb von
